publishedAbstract: - `registry` pod stuck in `ContainerCreating` due to PVC fail to mount with `Volume ID 0001-0011-openshift-storage-0000000000000001-aaaaaaaa-bbbb-cccc-dddd-eeeeeeeeeeee already exists`.- ceph mgr logs reporting `fs subvolume getpath` command failing: ~~~-------------------------------- log_channel(audit) log [DBG]: from='client.1234567-' entity='client.csi-cephfs-node'
